doc_title_en: Notice of Decision on Treasury Share Acquisition Matters (acquisition of treasury shares under the Articles of Incorporation pursuant to the Companies Act Article 165, Paragraph 2)

key_facts.reason_jp: 譲渡制限付株式報酬制度における制度対象者に交付する株式への充当

name_jp: フィデアホールディングス
summary_en: ¥220.0M upper limit, 100,000 shares (0.55% of shares outstanding), acquisition window May 18 to June 19, 2026, open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange, for allocation to restricted share compensation program beneficiaries.
summary_jp: 上限¥220.0M、100,000株（S/O比0.55%）、取得期間2026年5月18日～6月19日、東京証券取引所における市場買付、譲渡制限付株式報酬制度対象者への充当目的。
tag_en: Buyback - 100,000 shares (0.55% S/O) - ¥220.0M - open market - May 18 to June 19, 2026
